message:
test(demo): add architecture-beta snapshot + PTY e2e coverage (bd-hudcn.1.17.1)

Add 5 snapshot tests for architecture-beta diagrams (basic 80x24/120x40,
stress 80x24/120x40/200x60) and a PTY e2e assertion verifying
diagram_type=architecture-beta appears in JSONL metrics output.

All 23 mega showcase snapshot tests pass. Quality gates clean.
